name: Sweet Milk Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs and sugar, blending carefully.
2. Sift flour, then measure and sift salt, baking powder, and spices.
3. Add alternately with combined milk, shortening, and flavorings to the egg and sugar mixture.
4. Chill dough.
5. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and roll into a sheet 1/3 inch thick.
6. Cut with a floured cutter.
7. Fry in deep fat (365 F) until brown.
8. Drain on crumpled absorbent paper.
9. Sprinkle with sugar.
